inputs.label: Daily Material Demand
inputs.businessContext: The amount of raw material required per day in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount of raw material required per day in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günlük kilogram cinsinden gerekli hammadde miktarı.

inputs.label: Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Unit cost of the material in EUR per kg.

businessContext_i18n.en: Unit cost of the material in EUR per kg.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin kg başına EUR cinsinden birim maliyeti.

inputs.label: Waste Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage of material wasted during processing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage of material wasted during processing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşleme sırasında israf edilmesi beklenen malzeme yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Number of Days
inputs.businessContext: Production period in days (default 30 for Whole 30).

businessContext_i18n.en: Production period in days (default 30 for Whole 30).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gün cinsinden üretim dönemi (varsayılan 30, Whole 30 için).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
